Triangle plot generic

Source: R/triangle-vis.R
plot_triangle.Rd

Generic function for triangle-style visualisations.

Usage

plot_triangle(x, ...)

Arguments

x

An object.

...

Additional arguments passed to methods.

Value

A plot object.
